method: Run L2-tagged benchmark queries against project_summary for projects with has_l2=true

queries.l2_answer: 685 stale tasks being triaged (621 unassigned, 37 onboarding, 23 real estate, 4 security). SCR-002 guardrails created. Overdue task reassignment to Luke (April 30). Batch cancellation pending (90 min planned).
queries.notes: This is the flagship L2 value case: a business question BM25 can't answer because the terms aren't in raw session text, but the AI-generated topic summary captures the context.

queries.l2_answer: No specific ADR topic in ciso L2. L1 found results across other projects. L2 would help if more projects had summaries.
queries.notes: L1 already handles this (weakly). L2 would strengthen it only with broader project coverage.

queries.l2_answer: Governance structures and operational playbooks being built. repo-visibility-audit.md playbook, publish-policy.md, SCR FAQ guardrails. Goal: automated checklists that prevent security errors.
queries.notes: Both L1 and L2 answer this. L2 provides richer project-level narrative. Score would improve with L2-boosted ranking.

queries.l2_answer: cockpit-eidos has 46 sessions but no L2 summary generated yet.
queries.notes: L2 not available for this project. Would need L2 generation for cockpit-eidos to validate.

consumer_validation.test: Can an agent answer 'What is the status of the Wrike renewal?' from L2 without searching sessions?
consumer_validation.evidence: project_summary returns topic 'Wrike Renewal & Task Management' with status, narrative, key decisions, and open threads. All needed context is in the summary — no drill-down to individual sessions required.

summary.recommendation: L2 summaries work. Generate them for cockpit-eidos (46 sessions), greenmark-cockpit (49 sessions), and reeves (47 sessions) to extend coverage to the most active projects.
